ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the distributor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the distributor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the distributor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the movie */,
  "new_this_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is new this day */,
  "estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is estimated */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office data entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie associated with the box office data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the box office data */,
  "daily_rank" INTEGER /* Daily rank of the movie */,
  "daily_gross" TEXT /* Daily gross revenue of the movie */,
  "daily_change" TEXT /* Daily change in gross revenue */,
  "weekly_rank" INTEGER /* Weekly rank of the movie */,
  "weekly_gross" TEXT /* Weekly gross revenue of the movie */,
  "weekly_change" TEXT /* Weekly change in gross revenue */,
  "theaters" INTEGER /* Number of theaters showing the movie */,
  "avg_revenue" TEXT /* Average revenue per theater */,
  "total_gross" TEXT /* Total gross revenue of the movie */,
  "days_in_release" INTEGER /* Number of days the movie has been in release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_data_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_box_office_data, edit_movies, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed by the user (e.g., viewed box office data, edited movie, etc.) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
